contracts.stability_policy: Within a given schema_version, field names and types are immutable.
contracts.null_value_policy: Missing values must be explicitly null. Never omitted.
contracts.computational_intent: The dataset is designed for computation, not interpretation. Any analytical inference must be performed downstream.

rt1_latency.description: EBA RT1 clearing queue latency time-series observations

target2_settlement.description: TARGET2 weekend settlement frictions and queue times

lcr_velocity.description: Basel III Liquidity Coverage Ratio collateral velocity parameters

tfin_schema.description: Tokenized Financial Identity JSON Schema validation specs
